name: spin_deps_k1
drl:
rule J1 salience 5 when $e : E0($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RN salience 9 when not D() P() then end
rule RL salience 1 when P() then end
_finding: D-175: a previously-UNKNOWN latent D-117 family member — k=1 justifier (single-pattern rule, NO temporal join): advance marks E0(0), same epoch deletes it + inserts a fresh E0 so J1 re-fires mid-window; the tms_eager_break mark-route sends the dead-tuple teardown to exp_deferred and the post-fire drain cycles. Pre-fix: SPINS. Post-fix: PASSES byte-identical (oracle 3x [J1, RN, J1, RL]) — at k=1 the eager drop lands at DELETE-ACTION time, before the pick, so the full sequence reproduces. Graduate to LIVE pin at landing.
